name: Coca-Cola Carrot Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 cups sifted flour                 1/2 cup Vegetable oil
2 tablespoons cocoa                  2 1/4 cups grated raw carrots
recipeInstructions:
------------------------------COCA-COLA SYRUP------------------------------
3/4 cup sugar                       6 tablespoons butter
2 tablespoons cocoa                 2 teaspoons light corn syrup
6 tablespoons Coca-Cola             1/2 teaspoon vanilla
1/2 teaspoon salt
Mix all the dry ingredients together. Beat the eggs well; add sugar, oil,
3/4 cup cola, and vanilla and beat well. Stir in the dry ingredients until
smooth, then add the carrots, nuts, and coconut. Mix well. Bake in a greased
and lightly floured 13 x 9 pan in a preheated 350°F oven for 40-50 minutes,
until cake tests done. Remove from oven and prick hot cake all over with a
fork, then pour the cola syrup slowly, evenly over the top. Serve warm or
at room temperature with lightly sweetened-vanilla flavored whipped cream.
Coca-Cola Syrup: Combine sugar, cocoa, cola, butter, and corn syrup in a saucepan;
bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly. Boil, stirring,
until thick and syrupy, about 5 minutes. Add vanilla extract. Remove from
heat and pour, hot, over the hot cake.
